_comment: Edit this file to change the Reading / Talks lists, then rebuild. One object per item.

books.title: Project Hail Mary
books.author: Andy Weir
books.note: A problem-solving-as-survival sci-fi novel: first-principles reasoning under extreme constraints.

books.title: Deep Work
books.author: Cal Newport
books.note: On cultivating sustained, distraction-free focus as a competitive advantage for knowledge work.

books.title: Principles of Mixed-Initiative User Interfaces
books.author: Eric Horvitz (CHI 1999)
books.note: The foundational paper on designing systems where humans and automated agents collaborate fluidly.

books.title: The Bitter Lesson
books.author: Richard Sutton
books.note: Short essay arguing that general methods leveraging computation tend to win out over hand-crafted knowledge.

videos.title: The Last Lecture: Achieving Your Childhood Dreams
videos.author: Randy Pausch
videos.note: Prof. Randy Pausch's wise, funny lecture on living with intention.

videos.title: How to Live an Asymmetric Life
videos.author: Graham Weaver (Stanford GSB Last Lecture)
videos.note: On doing hard things for decades and betting on outsized, asymmetric outcomes.
